# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-container
        image: yourusername/nodejs-microservice:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          value: mongodb+srv://<username>:<password>@cluster.mongodb.net/database?retryWrites=true&w=majority
        imagePullPolicy: Always
      restartPolicy: Always
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  selector:
    app: nodejs-microservice
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
